sources.name: Indian Kanoon
sources.coverage: Supreme Court, 24 High Courts, tribunals, Law Commission, parliamentary debates; ~30M+ documents
sources.access: Paid API at api.indiankanoon.org (Rs 500 signup credit; reported non-commercial Rs 10,000/month free credit — uncertain — verify 2026); direct HTML scraping risky under ToS. Third-party 'kanoon.dev' exists but unofficial.
sources.license: Proprietary ToS on compiled corpus; underlying judgments public-domain under Indian Copyright Act §52(1)(q)

sources.name: Supreme Court of India + e-SCR
sources.coverage: e-SCR: reported SC judgments from 1950 (~34,000+ at Jan 2023 launch, growing);  main.sci: daily orders, cause lists, case status. Neutral citations adopted.
sources.access: Free web search/download; no official bulk API
sources.license: Public-domain under §52(1)(q) Indian Copyright Act (government works / judgments)

sources.name: India Code
sources.type: official (Legislative Dept, Ministry of Law & Justice; DSpace)
sources.coverage: All enforced central + state Acts + rules, regulations, notifications, ordinances
sources.access: DSpace handle URLs; OAI-PMH may be available — uncertain — verify
sources.license: Public-domain government works (no explicit open-data license)

sources.name: eCourts (district + HC aggregation)
sources.coverage: District + HC case status, cause lists, orders/judgments across India;  full-text elastic search at judgments.ecourts.gov.in
sources.access: Free web + CAPTCHA; no documented bulk API

sources.name: PRS India
sources.coverage: Bills (central + state), Acts, policy briefs, budget analyses, committee reports
sources.access: Free web; no formal API; CC license allows crawling
sources.license: CC BY 4.0 (site-wide) — best-licensed Indian legal source for RAG

sources.name: High Court websites (Delhi, Bombay, Kerala, etc.)
sources.coverage: Respective HC judgments + orders; Delhi + Kerala adopted neutral citations; also aggregated in ecourts
sources.access: Free web, some CAPTCHA; no unified API

sources.name: Legislative Department (Ministry of Law & Justice)
sources.coverage: Constitution, Central Acts, gazette notifications, drafting manuals

sources.name: Gazette of India
sources.coverage: Daily official gazette — central notifications, orders, appointments, rules
sources.access: Free web; downloadable per issue; no bulk API
sources.format: PDF (older issues often scanned — OCR needed)
